title: vangueria induta
intro: Vangueria induta, a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, is commonly known as the "Buffalo horn" or "Mbalabali" due to its unique horn-like growths. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Vangueria induta include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional African medicine for its various health benefits.
